# UQ Reality Labs

UQ Reality Labs is a single-page interactive site with comic 3D visuals, chalk-and-bee navigation, a committee directory, and social/contact tabs.

## Primary Sections

- Home: interactive 3D hero and section navigation
- About: short overview content
- Committee: role cards and member popups from `static/content/roles/*.md`
- Sponsors: sponsor content from `static/content/tabs/sponsors.md`
- Socials: social cards and metadata from `static/content/tabs/socials.md`
- Contact: contact content from `static/content/tabs/contact.md`

## Key Assets

- `static/Assets/images/labs_logo.png`
- `static/Assets/images/Cyrus.webp`
- `static/Assets/keything.glb`

## Notes

- The production site is deployed from the `prod` branch.
- Content is static and markdown-driven.
